docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF STERN, RONALD L AS TO DEFENDANT DAVE MARTINEZ DBA A DOOR & GATE CO
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STERN, RONALD L SERVED SEP-09-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DAVE MARTINEZ DBA A DOOR & GATE CO
